heading: Stockpile stewardship criteria
label: 6113 Stockpile stewardship criteria
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 6113 was renumbered .section 8253 of this titleProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2522 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.heading: .—Requirement for Criteria
children.label: a .—Requirement for Criteria
children.text: The Secretary of Energy shall develop clear and specific criteria for judging whether the science-based tools being used by the Department of Energy for determining the safety and reliability of the nuclear weapons stockpile are performing in a manner that will provide an adequate degree of certainty that the stockpile is safe and reliable.

children.heading: .—Coordination With Secretary of Defense
children.label: b .—Coordination With Secretary of Defense
children.text: The Secretary of Energy, in developing the criteria required by subsection (a), shall coordinate with the Secretary of Defense.
